description: unnecessary 'use client' on a pure presentational component
missing 'use client' even though the component uses state and an event handler

default export for a component instead of a named export
named export matches the repo component convention
manual string concatenation for conditional Tailwind classes
cn() merges conditional Tailwind classes cleanly
component is defined inside another component and remounts on every render
subcomponent is extracted outside so React can preserve identity

ruleTitle: Prefer Regular ref Props over forwardRef
description: unnecessary forwardRef wrapper in React 19 app code

ruleTitle: Prefer Regular ref Props over forwardRef
description: regular ref prop keeps the component simpler in React 19

passes only the fields the client component actually renders

ruleTitle: Use Explicit Conditionals for Falsy Values
description: 0 renders as text instead of hiding the badge

ruleTitle: Use Explicit Conditionals for Falsy Values
description: explicit comparison avoids confusing falsy rendering
too many boolean props create an unmaintainable mode matrix
explicit variants avoid boolean prop proliferation

derived value is computed directly during render

ruleTitle: Put Interaction Logic in Event Handlers
description: click-driven work is modeled as state plus effect

description: click-driven work happens in the event handler directly

functional update avoids stale closures and extra callback dependencies

ruleTitle: Prefer the Shared Query Layer over useEffect Fetching
